description: Detect secrets in commit before push using gitleaks

checks.name: secret-detection
checks.label: Secret Detection
checks.description: Run gitleaks to detect hardcoded secrets, API keys, and credentials
checks.pass: gitleaks detect returns exit code 0 (no secrets found)

failure.userMessage: Secrets detected in commit. Remove all hardcoded secrets, API keys, and credentials before proceeding. Use environment variables instead.
